findings.description: The source RST contains 3 h2-level sections (BasicPermissionFactoryの設定方法, 特定のリクエストIDを認可判定の対象から除外する方法, 使用例), and the first h2 alone exceeds 2000 chars of plain text with multiple h3 subsections (PermissionCheckHandlerの設定, BasicPermissionFactoryの設定, GroupTableSchemaの設定, SystemAccountTableSchemaの設定, etc.). All content is merged into a single section s1. Per V3 rules, a section with >= 2000 chars and existing h3 subsections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 sections: 'BasicPermissionFactoryの設定方法' (with h3: PermissionCheckHandlerの設定, BasicPermissionFactoryの設定, GroupTableSchemaの設定, SystemAccountTableSchemaの設定, GroupSystemAccountTableSchemaの設定, PermissionUnitTableSchemaの設定, PermissionUnitRequestTableSchemaの設定, GroupAuthorityTableSchemaの設定, SystemAccountAuthorityTableSchemaの設定), '特定のリクエストIDを認可判定の対象から除外する方法', '使用例'
